name: Optimizing RAG query latency and retrieval quality

description: Switch to gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview - no latency improvement
Increase top_k to 12 - no quality improvement, slight latency increase
Switch to gemini-2.5-flash - latency and quality unchanged
Switch to claude-3-haiku - latency and quality unchanged (within noise)
Add cache management endpoints (stats + clear) for production readiness

Add Cache TTL support with RAG_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS env var (default 1 hour). Cache entries now expire after TTL, preventing stale answers when documents are updated. Updated /cache/stats to include ttl_seconds.
Add cache hit/miss tracking for observability. Updated /cache/stats to include hits, misses, and ttl_seconds. Cache clear now resets hit/miss counters.

name: Optimizing RAG query latency and retrieval quality
